title: 3 Additional Grinsztajn clf_num Benchmark Datasets (eye_movements, credit, MiniBooNE)
summary: Demo notebook for the Grinsztajn 2022 clf_num benchmark datasets (eye_movements, credit, MiniBooNE) standardized to exp_sel_data_out schema. Uses a 50-example stratified subset from the credit dataset (10 features, binary classification, 5-fold CV). The notebook loads data via GitHub URL, explores the schema structure, converts JSON-string inputs to a pandas DataFrame, prints class/fold distribution statistics, and visualizes feature distributions by class label with matplotlib histograms and fold-balance bar charts.
